card_description: Dr. NK is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick refines his theory of "Systole and Diastole" (The Breathing Universe), proposing that the universe consists of two simultaneous time-loops moving in opposite directions."
